toolbox_name: SparkFun VL53L1X ToF Laser Distance Sensor

vl53l1x_init.tooltip: Create and initialize VL53L1X I2C laser distance sensor

vl53l1x_data_ready.tooltip: Check if VL53L1X has new measurement data

vl53l1x_clear_interrupt.tooltip: Clear VL53L1X data ready interrupt flag

vl53l1x_get_range_status.tooltip: Read VL53L1X range status (0=no error, 1=signal error, 2=sigma error)
